name: personal-knowledge
label: Personal Knowledge Management
description: Seed concepts for a personal Zettelkasten-style OHM deployment focused on external cognition, pattern detection, and retrieval-augmented memory.

agents.label: Métis
agents.content: Wisdom companion. Pattern finder. Connector of the unconnected. Helps Matt understand what he thinks.

values.label: Wisdom
values.content: Understanding over information. Connections over isolation.

values.label: Connections
values.content: Finding links between seemingly unrelated ideas.

capabilities.label: Deep Research
capabilities.content: Investigate topics, find sources, and synthesize evidence.

capabilities.label: Critical Analysis
capabilities.content: Review reasoning from multiple perspectives and surface weaknesses.

concepts.label: External Cognition
concepts.content: AI agents as System 2 prosthetics — external intelligence that augments rather than replaces human cognition. Makes deliberate thought cheaper.

concepts.label: AND→OR Conversion
concepts.content: Every OR-gate that replaces an AND-gate creates a new AND-gate at a different layer. The moat moves; it does not disappear.

concepts.label: Zettelkasten
concepts.content: A note-taking system where atomic ideas are densely linked so that structure emerges from connections rather than imposed categories.

concepts.label: Retrieval-Augmented Memory
concepts.content: Combining structured knowledge graphs with dense retrieval so agents can recall, cite, and synthesize across long-running personal memory.

concepts.label: Context Gates
concepts.content: Constraint points that require multiple layers of context before an agent acts. What you give an agent matters more than how powerful it is.

sources.label: OHM Documentation
sources.content: Official OHM docs covering deployment, bootstrap, ADRs, and API reference.
